note: VISIBLE-image-admitted 2026-06-07. Real sovereign MMDiT + flow-match + VAE pipeline (open-source/gnosis/distributed-inference/src/model_flux_mmdit.rs, bin flux-txt2img --real). Every stage reference-diffed against a diffusers single-block reference to cos~1.0; three bugs found+fixed (final-AdaLN scale/shift swap, a single-stream divergence, a VAE decode-graph divergence). 256x256/4-step renders are coherent, recognizable, and prompt-sensitive (apple vs ocean = distinct compositions). conv2d + joint_attention rayon-parallelized bit-identical. Supersedes the prior artifact-shape-only/structural admission. Perf note: DiT q8 matmuls dominate 256^2 wall (~14.5min) and are core-saturated; full-res speed is SIMD-kernel work, not correctness. Generative image gate is non-token (no argmax): admission proves a finite, non-degenerate, prompt-sensitive, reference-verified visible render, per Taylor's 'quality gates can be less strict where there is no suitable argmax' policy.
